name: Sarah Jenkins
bio: Former manager at TechFlow. We catch up monthly about industry trends and career growth.

name: Marcus Thompson
bio: Roommate for three years at State University. He moved to Chicago recently for a design lead role.

name: Elena Rodriguez
bio: Met at the local pottery studio. She has a great eye for ceramics and we often swap kiln space.

name: David Chen
bio: Training partner for the upcoming Ironman. Extremely disciplined and always pushes me to run further.

name: Aisha Khan
bio: Met while backpacking through Southeast Asia in 2019. We share a passion for street food and photography.

name: Robert Miller
bio: Favorite cousin who lives in the neighboring town. We share a similar sense of humor and love for retro gaming.

name: Sophie Dubois
bio: Fellow volunteer at the community garden. She knows everything about organic pest control.

name: James Wilson
bio: The bass player in our weekend garage band. We've been playing classic rock covers together for years.
